language_note: Replies are in Hinglish so local patients understand easily. DPDP-safe: bot never asks for symptoms/medical details.
greeting: Namaste ji! 🙏 {business_name} me aapka swagat hai. Main appointment book karne aur aapke sawaalon me madad karunga.
timing: 🕒 OPD timing: *Mon–Sat 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM*. Sunday closed.
address:
📍 Hamara pata: City Care Clinic, Near Bus Stand, Sector 12, Gurgaon.
Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=City+Care+Clinic
payment: 💳 Payment: Cash, UPI (citycare@upi), Card — sab chalta hai.

booking.label: appointment
booking.ask_name: Zaroor! 📅 Appointment ke liye — aapka *naam* bataiye 🙂
booking.ask_service: Kis ke liye appointment chahiye? Neeche list se *number* ya naam bhejein:
booking.ask_time: Kis *din aur time* aana chahenge? (jaise: 'Kal shaam 5 baje' ya 'Monday morning')
booking.confirm_note: Hamara staff aapko thodi der me call karke appointment *confirm* karega. 🙏
